modules.title: Is 9 Week Control Freak Right for Me?
modules.content: To get strong, lean, and powerful, you have to take control of the things that truly dictate the quality of your life, like strength, stamina, nutrition, and even sleep. Super Trainer Autumn Calabrese brings together her most powerful tools for truly game-changing results. Now, it’s up to you. Are you ready to become a control freak?

modules.title: What Are the Workouts Like?
modules.content: 9 Week Control Freak is broken into 3 phases, 3 weeks each, that build in intensity so you can avoid plateaus. There are 5 workouts a week—3 feature density training, strength complexes, and Tabata-inspired cardio designed to help build lean muscle and burn maximum fat, while the other 2 workouts focus on total-body toning or more Tabata-inspired cardio and core training. There are bonus workouts that can be added to any day, plus nightly controlled stretches to reframe your mind, relax your body, and get you ready for the next workout.

modules.title: Tools and Equipment
modules.content: Read the 9 Week Control Freak Get Started Guide for what you can expect, and how you can prepare, for the next 9 weeks. Download the Brag Board and Daily Trackers, so you can immediately begin tracking your progress through each workout. Explore the BODi Quick Start Nutrition Guide for an overview of Ultimate Portion Fix and 2B Mindset, plus strategies for meal planning and prep, and delicious recipes. You’ll need dumbbells, a core ball, and a Control Track. Refer to Control Track installation videos under “Getting Started” for more information.

trainers.bio: Super Trainer Autumn Calabrese is the creator of 4 Weeks For Every Body™, 21 Day Fix® and as well as other breakthrough fitness programs, the nutrition program The 4 Week Gut Protocol®, FIXATE®, and the Portion Fix® eating plan. She’s a certified holistic health coach through the Institute of Integrative Nutrition and has held certifications from NASM and AFPA.

modules.title: Emily F. lost 13 lbs. with 9 Week Control Freak
modules.testimonial: This program is so different than anything I’ve ever done before. A huge perk as a mom is that these workouts fly by. It’s hard to talk yourself out of a workout that is just 30 min…this program has gotten me back into a routine and made me fall in love all over again with these at home workouts.
modules.disclaimer: Results vary based on starting point and effort and following Beachbody’s exercise and healthy eating plan. Results achieved in 9 weeks with 9 Week Control Freak using Shakeology and Beachbody Performance Supplements. Emily F. is an independent Team Beachbody Coach.
